Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable
Observable SPI and core implementations for the failover lifecycle.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.manifest
Manifest-based metadata extraction for the failover observable report.

  • Uses of ManifestInfoExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ManifestInfoExtractor
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.manifestInfoExtractor(ResourceLoader resourceLoader)
    Registers a caching manifest extractor for reading build metadata from MANIFEST.MF.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverObserver
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverObserver(CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Creates the failover reporter bean that publishes a startup summary.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DefaultFailoverObserver(ObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, Map<String,String> additionalInfo)

  • Uses of ManifestInfoExtractor in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.manifest

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.manifest that implement ManifestInfoExtractor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CacheableManifestInfoExtractor
    ManifestInfoExtractor decorator that caches extraction results by artifact title to avoid repeated classpath scans.
    class 
    DefaultManifestInfoExtractor
    ManifestInfoExtractor that searches all META-INF/MANIFEST.MF resources on the classpath for an entry whose Implementation-Title matches the requested title.
